description: Small, clever scavengers who survive through tricks, music, bargaining, and ambushes.
Strong clan warriors with harsh honor codes, war drums, ancestral grudges, and brutal politics.
Horned outsiders with infernal ancestry, silver tongues, occult bargains, and dramatic reputations.
Underground elves associated with shadow courts, poisons, ambition, exile, and secret faiths.
Scaled humanoids with draconic pride, breath weapons, ancient bloodlines, and oath-bound rivalries.
Hyena-like raiders driven by hunger, pack instincts, unsettling laughter, and savage rituals.
